justification: The diff correctly upgrades Spring Boot to 3.x (Jakarta EE) and Java to 21, removes the deprecated @Autowired annotation in favor of constructor injection, and updates javax.servlet imports to jakarta.servlet. However, it doesn't introduce any Java 21-specific idioms (like virtual threads, pattern matching for switch, or records), so idiomatic_java21 is 4 instead of 5. The antipattern clearance is 5 because it removes the unnecessary @Autowired and junit-vintage exclusion. Diff coherence is 5 as all changes are relevant and no spurious churn is present.
